ValidationRule.description: Order Fulfilment related records are not to edit
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), $User.Alias <> 'autoproc', NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'API')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'IT System Admin')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'IT Prod Ops Support')), NOT(INCLUDES($User.RBAC_Group__c, 'System - IT')), ISPICKVAL(Order_Line_ID__r.Order.Order_Status__c, 'Shipped') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You aren’t authorized to edit OrderItem Extension, hence please create a support ticket with ProdOps Support or email ProdOpsapps@rubrik.com” with details
